faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about the AI Kissing effect.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: Most videos generate in under a minute, depending on demand.

items.question: What photos work best?
items.answer: Use high-resolution images with clear faces and good lighting.

items.question: Can I use the result commercially?
items.answer: Yes, you can use the generated video for personal or commercial projects.
